message:
fix(clients): add non-null assertions for array access in contract tests

Fix TypeScript errors for exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance:
- Cast result.sessions to typed array for NTM snapshot test
- Add ! assertions after toHaveLength() checks for array access
- Fixes prompts[0], suggestions[0], invocations[0/1] accesses
